ExitCode.description:
Process exit code newtype.

Distinguishes exit codes from other i32 values. Unix convention:
- 0: success
- 1-125: application-defined errors
- 126: command not executable
- 127: command not found
- 128+N: killed by signal N

HostName.description:
The hostname where an event occurred.

Always valid by construction. Use [`HostName::new`] to parse runtime input,
or [`HostName::from_static`] for compile-time literals.

Valid format: ASCII alphanumeric labels separated by dots, with optional
interior hyphens. Labels may not start or end with `-`, may not be empty,
and the full hostname must not exceed 255 bytes.

Nanoseconds.description: Nanosecond-count newtype for very high-precision timing.

RecordedPath.description: A path recorded from observational data (filesystem events, shell CWDs). Preserved verbatim except null bytes.

description: Atuin command execution captured from history ingestion.
